zotero.abstractNote: We provide a unifying Perron-Frobenius theorem for nonnegative tensors. Our approach is based on the study of multi-homogeneous maps and their spectral properties. We show that the Perron-Frobenius theorem for nonnegative tensors can be derived from the properties of these maps. We also provide a new characterization of the spectral radius of a nonnegative tensor and a new algorithm for its computation.
